characters.appearance: Young Asian woman, slim build, fair complexion. Long dark hair, usually tied back. Expressive and energetic facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Varies: blue striped shirt, grey ribbed top, black long-sleeve with track pants, dark green t-shirt. Casual and comfortable styling.

characters.appearance: Not visible; represented by the app interface and voice.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं एक working professional हूँ और अपनी English improve कर रही हूँ। [I am a working professional and I'm improving my English.]
Character A says: Job में बहुत बिज़ी रहती हूँ। [I stay very busy with my job.]
Character A says: आस-पास English बोलने का माहौल ही नहीं है, पर मुझे fluent बनना है। [There is no environment to speak English around me, but I want to become fluent.]
Character A says: और बिना बोले तो English आएगी नहीं, right? [And English won't come without speaking, right?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the target audience (busy Indian professionals) by stating a relatable problem: lack of time and English-speaking environment.
- Establishes the core truth that speaking practice is mandatory for fluency.
- Sets an energetic, practical tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Working professional हूँ (I am a working professional)
Job में बहुत बिज़ी (Very busy with job)
English बोलने का माहौल नहीं है (No environment to speak English)
पर Fluent बनना है! (But want to become fluent!)
बिना बोले English नहीं आएगी (English won't come without speaking)
इसलिए अब मैं (So now I)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इसलिए अब मैं रोज़ Supernova app पर English speaking की practice करती हूँ। [So now I practice English speaking every day on the Supernova app.]
Character B says: That's great! So you'd say, "I found a really good recipe on YouTube." Nice and natural. By the way, Mexican salsa and Indian paratha sounds like a wild combo! What made you pick those two? [That's great! So you'd say, "I found a really good recipe on YouTube." Nice and natural. By the way, Mexican salsa and Indian paratha sounds like a wild combo! What made you pick those two?]
Character A says: Just... I'm craving for it. [Just... I'm craving for it.]
Character B says: You can just say "I'm craving it" without "for". [You can just say "I'm craving it" without "for".]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the daily solution that fits into a busy routine (hands-free while cooking).
- Demonstrates the AI's conversational ability and contextual understanding.
- Shows a gentle, immediate correction of a common Indian-English mistake.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ Supernova पर English speaking practice (Daily English speaking practice on Supernova)
Hands-free इस्तेमाल करो, काम करते हुए भी! (Use hands-free, even while working!)
Mexican salsa and Indian paratha sounds like a wild combo! (Mexican salsa and Indian paratha sounds like a wild combo!)
Just... I'm craving for it. (Just... I'm craving for it.)
तुरंत गलतियां ठीक करता है! (Corrects mistakes instantly!)
You can just say "I'm craving it" without "for". (You can just say "I'm craving it" without "for".)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सच में ऐसा लगता है जैसे किसी दोस्त से फ़ोन पर बात कर रही हूँ! [It seriously feels like I'm talking to a friend on the phone!]
Character A says: एकदम natural conversation होती है, तो काम करते-करते भी English अपने आप मुँह से निकलती है। [It's a completely natural conversation, so English comes out of my mouth automatically even while working.]
Character A says: I make... not too close, not too far boundaries between my team. [I make... not too close, not too far boundaries between my team.]
Character B says: When talking about professional relationships, "set boundaries" is a more natural phrase. That sounds really professional. How do you usually set boundaries with your team? [When talking about professional relationships, "set boundaries" is a more natural phrase. That sounds really professional. How do you usually set boundaries with your team?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the realistic, non-intimidating nature of the AI tutor (feels like a friend).
- Shows how the app helps learners upgrade their professional vocabulary (e.g., "make boundaries" to "set boundaries").
- Reinforces the ease of multitasking while learning.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
सच में किसी दोस्त से फ़ोन पर बात करने जैसा! (Seriously like talking to a friend on the phone!)
एकदम natural conversation (Completely natural conversation)
काम करते-करते English अपने आप निकलती है (English comes out automatically while working)
Office की बातें हो रही हैं (Talking about office stuff)
I make... (I make...)
boundaries between my team. (boundaries between my team.)
"Set boundaries" is a more natural phrase. ("Set boundaries" is a more natural phrase.)
That sounds really professional. (That sounds really professional.)
How do you usually set boundaries with your team? (How do you usually set boundaries with your team?)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: देखा? जैसे ही मैंने गलती की, इसने real-time में मुझे correct कर दिया। [See? The moment I made a mistake, it corrected me in real-time.]
Character A says: और conversation का flow भी नहीं टूटता। मुझे पता ही नहीं चला और मैं एक घंटे तक English में बात करती रही! [And the flow of the conversation doesn't break either. I didn't even realize and I kept talking in English for an hour!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Emphasizes the seamless real-time correction feature.
- Builds confidence by showing that the learner can sustain a long conversation without feeling discouraged.
- Acts as the emotional peak of the ad, showing the user's breakthrough.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
देखा? (See?)
गलती करते ही real-time correction (Real-time correction the moment you make a mistake)
Conversation का flow भी नहीं टूटता (The flow of the conversation doesn't break either)
एक घंटे तक लगातार English में बात की! (Talked continuously in English for an hour!)
ये feature सबसे best है (This feature is the best)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: और इसका सबसे best part पता है क्या है? [And you know what its best part is?]
Character A says: जो words मैंने गलत बोले, मैं सिर्फ उन पर focus करके practice कर सकती हूँ। [I can focus and practice only on the words I said wrong.]
Character A says: है ना एकदम efficient? [Isn't it super efficient?]
Character A says: Colleague. [Colleague.]
Character B says: Colleague. [Colleague.]
Character A says: Call ख़त्म होने के बाद अपनी weak points का revision करो। [After the call ends, revise your weak points.]
Character A says: रोज़ ऐसे practice करोगे तो confidence तो बढ़ेगा ही ना! [If you practice like this every day, your confidence will definitely increase!]
Character A says: चलो, आप भी Supernova के साथ अपनी English journey शुरू करो! [Come on, you too start your English journey with Supernova!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Showcases the post-conversation review and pronunciation tools.
- Reassures the learner that daily practice leads to guaranteed confidence.
- Delivers a warm, encouraging Call to Action to download Supernova.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
सिर्फ गलत बोले गए words की practice (Practice only the words spoken incorrectly)
है ना एकदम efficient? (Isn't it super efficient?)
Pronunciation सुधारने का pinpoint तरीका (Pinpoint way to improve pronunciation)
Colleague (Colleague)
Weak points का revision (Revision of weak points)
Multitasking करते हुए सीखना आसान है (Easy to learn while multitasking)
रोज़ practice = 100% Confidence (Daily practice = 100% Confidence)
आज ही Supernova के साथ English सीखना शुरू करें! (Start learning English with Supernova today!)
